case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY vs. DE PAZ, GIOVANNI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DE PAZ, GIOVANNI DOES ONE THROUGH FIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-14-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-17-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-28-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-14-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-14-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
